ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_labels" (
  "size_label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size label */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Size label (e.g., 1X, 2X, 3X) */,
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of product (e.g., tops, bottoms) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size label */,
  "is_custom_size" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size label is custom or standard */,
  "size_group" TEXT /* Size group (e.g., plus size, petite, regular) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_labels_product_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("product_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product type */,
  "product_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the product type (e.g., Tops, Bottoms) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product type (e.g., women's, men's, children's) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_details" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart entry */,
  "size_label_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size label */,
  "waist_min" REAL /* Minimum waist measurement */,
  "waist_max" REAL /* Maximum waist measurement */,
  "chest_min" REAL /* Minimum chest measurement */,
  "chest_max" REAL /* Maximum chest measurement */,
  "hips_min" REAL /* Minimum hips measurement */,
  "hips_max" REAL /* Maximum hips measurement */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement */,
  "neck_min" REAL /* Minimum neck measurement */,
  "neck_max" REAL /* Maximum neck measurement */,
  "inseam_regular" REAL /* Regular inseam measurement */,
  "inseam_petite" REAL /* Petite inseam measurement */,
  "inseam_tall" REAL /* Tall inseam measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_details_size_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_label_id") REFERENCES size_labels ("size_label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_label_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size label */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_label_id") REFERENCES size_labels ("size_label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "fabric" TEXT /* Fabric of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("product_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., store manager, inventory clerk, customer service) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_label_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size label */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_label_id") REFERENCES size_labels ("size_label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "size_label_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size label */,
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product type */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement */,
  "chest" REAL /* Chest measurement */,
  "hips" REAL /* Hips measurement */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement */,
  "neck" REAL /* Neck measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_product_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("product_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_size_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_label_id") REFERENCES size_labels ("size_label_id")
)
